code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut has = false
mut neg = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i <= n
  mut b = 32
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 32
    end
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if has
      mut v = cur
      if neg
        v = -cur
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
      cur = 0
      has = false
      neg = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    neg = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut cur_max = 0
mut first = true
for x in nums
  if first
    cur_max = x
    first = false
  else
    if x > cur_max
      cur_max = x
    end
  end
  result = list.push(result, cur_max)
end

mut out = ""
mut first2 = true
for v in result
  if first2
    out = "#{v}"
    first2 = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
println(out)
